mapper.insert: INSERT INTO messages( id, landlord_id, tenant_id, sender, content, message_type, attachment_url, is_read, created_at ) VALUES( #{id}, #{landlordId}, #{tenantId}, #{sender}, #{content}, #{messageType}, #{attachmentUrl}, #{isRead}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE messages SET is_read = TRUE WHERE landlord_id = #{landlordId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
